title: coreopsis aspera
intro: Coreopsis aspera, also known as rough coreopsis, is a perennial wildflower native to eastern North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Coreopsis aspera include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Coreopsis aspera typically involve infusing the dried flowers in hot water to make a tea, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
